records.question: What customers named Ottilie have the email morton06@example.net, customer number 523, phone 393-750-2077x72779, use Direct Debit, and live at 4098 Kreiger Knoll Suite 758?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id FROM customers
WHERE customers.customer_email = 'morton06@example.net' AND customers.customer_number = '523' AND customers.customer_name = 'Ottilie' AND customers.customer_phone = '393-750-2077x72779' AND customers.payment_method_code = 'Direct Debit' AND customers.customer_address = '4098 Kreiger Knoll Suite 758'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT c.customer_id
FROM Customers c
LEFT JOIN Customer_Address_History cah ON c.customer_id = cah.customer_id
LEFT JOIN Addresses a ON cah.address_id = a.address_id
WHERE c.customer_name = 'Ottilie'
AND c.customer_email = 'morton06@example.net'
AND c.customer_number = '523'
AND c.customer_phone = '393-750-2077x72779'
AND c.payment_method_code = 'Direct Debit'
AND c.customer_address = '4098 Kreiger Knoll Suite 758'

records.question: Who are the customers with customer number 838 named Cheyenne, whose phone is 009-136-4509x19635, address is 058 Ben Street Apt. 034, email is rhayes@example.org, payment method is Direct Debit, and had an address history from on or before 2013-06-14 23:07:04 to exactly 2018-03-16 14:49:28?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id FROM customers
JOIN customer_address_history ON customers.customer_id = customer_address_history.customer_id
WHERE customers.customer_number = '838' AND customers.customer_name = 'Cheyenne' AND customers.customer_phone = '009-136-4509x19635' AND customers.customer_address = '058 Ben Street Apt. 034' AND customers.customer_email = 'rhayes@example.org' AND customers.payment_method_code = 'Direct Debit' AND customer_address_history.date_from <= '2013-06-14 23:07:04' AND customer_address_history.date_to = '2018-03-16 14:49:28'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT c.customer_id
FROM Customers c
WHERE c.customer_number = '838'
  AND c.customer_name = 'Cheyenne'
  AND c.customer_phone = '009-136-4509x19635'
  AND c.customer_address = '058 Ben Street Apt. 034'
  AND c.customer_email = 'rhayes@example.org'
  AND c.payment_method_code = 'Direct Debit'
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM Customer_Address_History cah
    WHERE cah.customer_id = c.customer_id
      AND cah.date_from <= '2013-06-14 23:07:04'
      AND cah.date_to = '2018-03-16 14:49:28'
  )

records.question: Who are the customers with the phone number (192)144-4687 who have both order and address history information?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id FROM customers
JOIN customer_address_history ON customers.customer_id = customer_address_history.customer_id
JOIN customer_orders ON customers.customer_id = customer_orders.customer_id
WHERE customers.customer_phone = '(192)144-4687'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT c.customer_id
FROM Customers c
WHERE c.customer_phone = '(192)144-4687'
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM Customer_Orders co WHERE co.customer_id = c.customer_id)
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM Customer_Address_History cah WHERE cah.customer_id = c.customer_id)

SELECT customers.customer_id FROM customers
WHERE customers.payment_method_code = 'Credit Card' AND customers.customer_name = 'Sterling' AND customers.customer_phone = '896.685.8228x2786' AND customers.customer_address = '12174 Boyer Crossroad' AND customers.customer_email = 'stroman.chadd@example.net'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT c.customer_id
FROM Customers c
WHERE c.customer_name LIKE '%Sterling%'
AND c.customer_address = '12174 Boyer Crossroad'
AND c.payment_method_code = 'Credit Card'
AND c.customer_phone = '896.685.8228x2786'
AND c.customer_email = 'stroman.chadd@example.net'

records.question: Who are the customers with customer number 445 and email howard27@example.com whose address is exactly 251 Botsford Harbors Suite 399?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id FROM customers
JOIN customer_address_history ON customers.customer_id = customer_address_history.customer_id
JOIN customer_orders ON customers.customer_id = customer_orders.customer_id
WHERE customers.customer_address = '251 Botsford Harbors Suite 399' AND customers.customer_number = '445' AND customers.customer_email = 'howard27@example.com'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT c.customer_id
FROM Customers c
JOIN Customer_Address_History cah ON c.customer_id = cah.customer_id
JOIN Addresses a ON cah.address_id = a.address_id
WHERE c.customer_number = '445'
AND c.customer_email = 'howard27@example.com'
AND a.line_1_number_building = '251 Botsford Harbors Suite 399'
AND cah.date_to IS NULL

records.question: Who are the customers named Buford with phone number (192)144-4687 and address 650 Spencer Way Apt. 584, who have orders with status Part since 1979-07-13 17:19:40 and an address history date from at most 2008-06-22 21:50:44?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id FROM customers
JOIN customer_address_history ON customers.customer_id = customer_address_history.customer_id
JOIN customer_orders ON customers.customer_id = customer_orders.customer_id
WHERE customer_address_history.date_from <= '2008-06-22 21:50:44' AND customer_orders.order_status_code = 'Part' AND customers.customer_name = 'Buford' AND customers.customer_phone = '(192)144-4687' AND customers.customer_address = '650 Spencer Way Apt. 584' AND customer_orders.order_date >= '1979-07-13 17:19:40'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT c.customer_id
FROM Customers c
JOIN Contacts ct ON c.customer_id = ct.customer_id
JOIN Customer_Orders co ON c.customer_id = co.customer_id
JOIN Customer_Address_History cah ON c.customer_id = cah.customer_id
WHERE ct.last_name = 'Buford'
AND c.customer_phone = '(192)144-4687'
AND c.customer_address = '650 Spencer Way Apt. 584'
AND co.order_status_code = 'Part'
AND co.order_date >= '1979-07-13 17:19:40'
AND cah.date_from <= '2008-06-22 21:50:44'

records.question: Which customers have placed orders and had an address listed on or after 2018-03-07 05:29:10?

records.question: Who are the customers with customer_number 838 and address 058 Ben Street Apt. 034, whose phone is 009-136-4509x19635, payment method is Direct Debit, who placed completed orders on or before 1979-03-29 02:47:13, and whose address history spans from 2013-06-14 23:07:04 to at least 2018-03-16 14:49:28?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id FROM customers
JOIN customer_address_history ON customers.customer_id = customer_address_history.customer_id
JOIN customer_orders ON customers.customer_id = customer_orders.customer_id
WHERE customers.customer_phone = '009-136-4509x19635' AND customer_orders.order_date <= '1979-03-29 02:47:13' AND customer_orders.order_status_code = 'Completed' AND customers.payment_method_code = 'Direct Debit' AND customer_address_history.date_to >= '2018-03-16 14:49:28' AND customers.customer_number = '838' AND customers.customer_address = '058 Ben Street Apt. 034' AND customer_address_history.date_from = '2013-06-14 23:07:04'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT c.customer_id
FROM Customers c
JOIN Customer_Orders co ON c.customer_id = co.customer_id
JOIN Customer_Address_History cah ON c.customer_id = cah.customer_id
JOIN Addresses a ON cah.address_id = a.address_id
WHERE c.customer_number = '838'
AND a.line_1_number_building = '058 Ben Street Apt. 034'
AND c.customer_phone = '009-136-4509x19635'
AND c.payment_method_code = 'Direct Debit'
AND co.order_status_code = 'completed'
AND co.order_date <= '1979-03-29 02:47:13'
AND cah.date_from = '2013-06-14 23:07:04'
AND cah.date_to >= '2018-03-16 14:49:28'

records.question: Who are the customers with the phone number 672-559-0630x7875, email caesar.lemke@example.net, and address 4065 Forest Vista Apt. 103, living in Gilbertmouth, Virginia, USA, with a zip code of 167?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id FROM customers
JOIN customer_address_history ON customers.customer_id = customer_address_history.customer_id
JOIN addresses ON customer_address_history.address_id = addresses.address_id
WHERE addresses.zip_postcode = '167' AND customers.customer_phone = '672-559-0630x7875' AND customers.customer_address = '4065 Forest Vista Apt. 103' AND addresses.state_province_county = 'Virginia' AND customers.customer_email = 'caesar.lemke@example.net' AND addresses.country = 'USA' AND addresses.city = 'Gilbertmouth'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT c.customer_id
FROM Customers c
WHERE c.customer_phone = '672-559-0630x7875'
AND c.customer_email = 'caesar.lemke@example.net'
AND c.customer_address = '4065 Forest Vista Apt. 103'
AND EXISTS (
  SELECT 1
  FROM Customer_Address_History cah
  JOIN Addresses a ON cah.address_id = a.address_id
  WHERE cah.customer_id = c.customer_id
  AND a.line_1_number_building = '4065 Forest Vista Apt. 103'
  AND a.city = 'Gilbertmouth'
  AND a.state_province_county = 'Virginia'
  AND a.country = 'USA'
  AND a.zip_postcode = '167'
)
